deployment_question: How does the model perform on RNA structures structurally dissimilar from the training set?
definition: Construct train/test partitions that reduce structural similarity between held-out RNA structures and training structures.

split_operator.spectra_mapping: targets low structural-similarity regions rather than random sequence overlap

implementation_recipe: Compute or import structural similarity between RNA examples.
Cluster structures or solve for a dissimilar held-out set.
Report structural and sequence similarity across train/test.
quality_gates: Separate structural dissimilarity from sequence dissimilarity.
Report structure-quality filters and similarity metric.
Check whether common motifs leak across splits.
failure_modes: Sparse structural data can make clusters unstable.
Structure similarity metrics can be sensitive to alignment choices.
Held-out structures may differ in experimental quality.

citations.title: RNA3DB: A structurally-dissimilar dataset split
citations.evidence: Creates structurally dissimilar splits for RNA structure prediction benchmarking.

citations.title: GeSS: Benchmarking Geometric Deep Learning under Scientific Distribution Shifts
citations.evidence: Motivates structure-aware shift evaluation in scientific geometric data.
